calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Off Calendar

Progress Report On The Status Of The Fully Executed Reconveyance Of The Deed Of Trust To Plaintiffs Saulee Lee And Walter Y. Lee, And For Entry Of Final Judgment.
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Progress Report on the Status of the Fully Executed Reconveyance of the Deed of Trust to plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, and for Entry of Final Judgment.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Robert Yang, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, who were not present at this morning's hearing.
Interlocutory Judgment quieting title in favor of plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee was entered on April 12, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) Plaintiff Walter Y. Lee is entitled to a 50% ownership share of the subject property located at 2301 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, CA;

(2) Plaintiff Saulee Lee is entitled the to remaining 50% ownership of the subject property located at 2301 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, CA;

(3) The collateral $20,000.00, secured by the Deed of Trust recorded on November 29, 1990, as Document Number E824834, has been either repaid, fulfilled or otherwise discharged;

(4) That no persons other than plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, now have any mortgage or other lien of any description on the real property or any part of the real property, either legal or equatable, present or future, vested or contingent with no exception;

(5) The a full reconveyance of the Deed of Trust Previously hadl by Defendant First American Title Comany has been reconveyed to Walter Y. Lee, recorded on April 24, 2018, as Document Number 2018-K604886-00; and

(6) Judgment is hereby entered for plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee.

Proposed Final Judgment Quieting Title in Favor of Plaintiffs was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice And Request Of Evidentiary Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3788.

Robert Yang, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, who were placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Mandarin speaking interpreters Rebecca Chau and Mintao Huang were present at this morning's hearing to assist plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, if necessary.
Plaintiffs' complaint to Quiet Title was filed on April 13, 2017.
Disclaimer of Interest of First American Title Insurance Company as to plaintiffs' complaint was filed on May 2, 2017.
Default as to defendant Waller International, Inc. was filed on September 18, 2017.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Unisource Financial USA, was filed on January 25, 2018.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Derrick Quan, a/k/a Derrik Quan, was filed on April 11, 2018.
DOES 1-40 were dismissed on April 11, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) Plaintiff Walter Y. Lee is entitled to a 50% ownership share of the subject property located at 2301 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, CA;

(2) Plaintiff Saulee Lee is entitled the to remaining 50% ownership of the subject property located at 2301 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, CA;

(3) The collateral $20,000.00, secured by the Deed of Trust recorded on November 29, 1990, as Document Number E824834, has been either repaid, fulfilled or otherwise discharged; and

(4) That no persons other than plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, now have any mortgage or other lien of any description on the real property or any part of the real property located at 2301 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, CA.

Matter is CONTINUED to Tuesday, May 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the status of the fully executed reconveyance of the Deed of Trust by First American Trust Title Company to plaintiffs Saulee Lee and Walter Y. Lee, and for entry of Final Judgment.

Proposed Interlocutory Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice And Request Of Evidentiary Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Continued To Apr-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
